h1: Steps to Plan Your Fireplace Makeover with a Gas Insert
h2: How to Install a Gas Fireplace Insert
How to Update and Upgrade an Existing Fireplace

paragraphs: Dreaming of a fireplace makeover? Upgrade your existing wood-burning fireplace with a gas fireplace insert. But what exactly is a fireplace insert and what are the benefits? This overview will cover what a fireplace insert is, why homeowners choose gas inserts and the steps to take to get started on the fireplace makeover of your dreams today!

A fireplace insert is a self-contained fireplace designed to fit into an existing wood fireplace opening. Fireplace inserts can be fueled by gas, wood pellets, wood or electricity, and are installed by a hearth professional. Depending on size, elective features (ie. media, logs and fronts), installation costs, and venting, a fireplace makeover project starts at around $6,000.

Homeowners often purchase fireplace inserts to eliminate the issues of soot, ashes, and odor associated with burning wood. Furthermore, open wood fireplaces can be drafty and inefficient, making them rarely used. The solution to all these issues? Installing a gas fireplace insert!
Installing a Gas Fireplace Insert

The process of replacing a traditional wood-burning fireplace with a fireplace insert is straight-forward and can typically be completed swiftly by a hearth expert.(https://www.heatnglo.com/where-to-buy)

Why do gas insert installations require a professional? Both a gas line and electricity need to be run, and there’s also necessary roof work to ensuring your fireplace insert vents properly. Your local authorized fireplace professional (https://www.heatnglo.com/where-to-buy) can also obtain necessary permits and hire any necessary subcontractors. The number of professionals involved in your install comes down to where you live and your specific project. Whereas larger cities require multiple licensures and permits, smaller towns might allow a single contractor to do it all. Leave it to our installing professionals (https://www.heatnglo.com/where-to-buy) to sort this out.
Why Homeowners Choose Gas Inserts?

Easy to Use: Gas fireplace inserts redefine convenience with their user-friendly features. The ease of operation, often facilitated by remote controls, allows users to enjoy a real fire at the touch of a button.

Beautiful: Embracing modern design elements, gas fireplace inserts effortlessly blend functionality with aesthetics. From traditional aesthetics to more modern and contemporary designs, gas inserts enhance the visual appeal of a living space.

Safer: Safety takes center stage with gas fireplace inserts. Equipped with protective glass and screens, these inserts mitigate the risk associated with traditional wood-burning fireplaces. The controlled, contained flames reduce the chances of fire sparks, making them a safer choice for households with children or pets.
Warmer: Gas fireplace inserts deliver consistent and adjustable warmth, ensuring a cozy atmosphere without the unpredictability of a wood fire.

Efficient: Efficiency is a hallmark of gas fireplace inserts. They create an airtight seal that not only eliminates cold drafts but also maximizes the utilization of heat, making them a more energy-efficient option for heating your living space. The gas fireplace insert is designed to contain and radiate heat back into the room, rather than sending the most of that heat up a chimney flue.

Value: Investing in a gas fireplace insert adds significant value to your home and is a cost-effective solution. Their energy efficiency translates into potential cost savings on heating bills. Adding a fireplace to your home can also increase its resale value. According to the National Center for Real Estate Research, fireplaces can increase the value of the average home by up to 12 percent.

Begin by printing off the Pre-Consultation Checklist to help you get started on your fireplace makeover. The first step is measuring your existing fireplace to ensure you select the appropriate size and model. See below for our fireplace insert sizes and dimensions. Once you complete the form, you will want to bring it with you when you visit an authorized dealer.
Research your favorite gas insert fronts, surrounds, interior panels, and media to match your style. See chart below for options.
Now find a local authorized dealer near you and request a consult. Our authorized dealer showrooms will have fireplace insert examples for you to get inspiration.

Transform your home with our top-of-the-line Escape gas fireplace insert. The biggest, clearest view of the fire, hand-painted logs and efficient heating take your fireplace from unused to unbelievable. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Bring home the look of a wood fire – without the hassle. The SupremeX gas insert features flames that wrap around hand-painted logs, creating a natural, cozy glow enhanced by an LED ember bed. Designed to maximize your fireplace opening, this insert offers a large and immersive fireside experience. And with design options to fit your aesthetic, it’ll feel like it was always part of your home. Available in 30-inch width.

With big flames and classic style, the Supreme gas fireplace insert gives your old, cold fireplace a beautiful makeover. Choose from the widest variety of logs and interior styles to get the look you love. Gathering around a roaring fire has never been easier thanks to this low-maintenance fireplace insert. Available in 25, 30 and 35-inch widths.

Match your modern design style with the Cosmo gas insert. It fits directly inside your outdated, wood-burning firebox, turning an unusable fireplace into an efficient, easy-to-use gas fire. No more hassle, only pure fireplace enjoyment. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Restore the beauty and functionality of your fireplace with the Provident. This gas fireplace insert helps heat your home efficiently and provides a natural gathering space, all with the touch of a button. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.
When it comes to making over an old, wood-burning fireplace, it doesn’t get easier than installing an electric fireplace insert.
Learn how quickly and affordably fireplace insert venting really is.
Modernizing your home’s old wood fireplace is easy with an efficient and beautiful gas fireplace insert.
